summary: Session 1 of Set 096: the operator's consequence-graded severity rubric (L-095-1) plus a mandatory per-Issue failure-scenario line shipped in the verification template (session-verification-v3, hash-pinned; merge-decision anchor and anti-laundering escalation preserved subordinated to the rubric); the tolerant failureScenario field landed end-to-end (parser -> sN-issues envelope -> JSON schema -> schema doc, both schema versions, classify_blocking unchanged); the cross-round issue ledger became machinery in verify_session (auto-assembled from prior rounds' sN-issues*.json + the new sN-remediation-round-<R>.md sidecar, settled vs unresolved split by fail-closed settlement evidence); and the fan-out experiment ran on the frozen Set 095 corpus (K=3 same-model + 1 cross-provider, identical bundles, $0.80): same-model pairwise overlap is low (Jaccard 0.13-0.31; one run ~50% of the observed pool, two ~81% mean), the cross-provider call harvested nothing, and s1-fanout-experiment.md recommends discovery fan-out K=2 same-model with cross-provider kept as a verdict-calibration signal (sizes Session 2's --phase discovery). Verification dogfooded the machinery: round 1 returned one real Major against the new ledger (settled framing without settlement evidence, delivered WITH a parsed failureScenario), fixed fail-closed; round 2 VERIFIED clean under the auto-assembled ledger (2 rounds / $0.37 vs 095's 17 rounds / $4.88). Suite: pytest 2948 passed / 6 skipped (+26 new tests), extension Layer 2 1487 passing, tsc clean.

reason.specifics: Routed recommendation (s1-next-set-analysis.json): Session 2 is moderate, well-defined CLI code + tests + policy-doc restructure + the 095-corpus convergence replay, all downstream of the operator-directed phase design and the measured K=2 fan-out sizing; Sonnet-5 at medium effort is cheapest-capable, and an anthropic orchestrator keeps the openai/google cross-provider verification pool free.

deferred_issues: Five latent rubric-graded Majors against the SHIPPED Set 095 tutorial deliverables surfaced by the fan-out experiment (F1-F5 in s1-fanout-experiment.md: unittest test-framework contract not pinned by the walkthrough; reviewDecision treated as enforcement proof; ADVISORY caps able to suppress proven failures; owner-roster gap; hotfix drill's module-only pre-tag validation). Recorded with raw artifacts for operator disposition; out of this set's machinery scope.
